tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Babar Azam is one of the most consistent batsmen in modern cricket and has been the captain of the Pakistan national team.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He has been ranked among the top batsmen in ICC rankings across formats.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Babar Azam is known for his elegant batting style and cover drives.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Shahid Afridi was one of the most explosive all rounders in cricket history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He once held the record for the fastest century in ODI cricket.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Afridi was famous for his aggressive batting and leg spin bowling.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Wasim Akram is widely regarded as one of the greatest fast bowlers in cricket history.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He took more than 900 international wickets during his career.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Akram was famous for his deadly swing bowling and reverse swing deliveries.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Imran Khan is one of Pakistan's greatest cricket captains and all rounders.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He led Pakistan to victory in the 1992 ICC Cricket World Cup.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: After retirement he became the Prime Minister of Pakistan.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Mohammad Rizwan is one of the most consistent wicketkeeper batsmen in modern T20 cricket.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He has scored thousands of runs in international T20 matches.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Rizwan is known for his fitness, discipline and match finishing ability.
